newsSince: No new company-specific news since June 9. The Q2 FY26 print (sales +17%, orders +41% YoY, Americas orders +63%, gross margin +300bps to 22%, ~$50M net cash, no debt) was reported June 5 and was already incorporated into the June 9 'up' verdict.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-node lens: the June 5 order/margin inflection (+41% orders, +63% Americas, net cash ~36% of cap) was the basis for the June 9 up-move and is now priced. No fresh evidence since; the +2.2% drift adds nothing. Hold rank 21; thesis is machine-tool demand upturn, not direct AI-node proof.
verdicts.bull: US machine-tool demand inflecting; 5-axis mix richening; net cash ~$50M (36% of cap) gives downside asymmetry.
verdicts.neutral: Strong order print already digested; still loss-making at the net line; AI-node link is indirect/optional.
verdicts.bear: Microcap CNC vendor; AI-infra connection is speculative; Germany weak; cyclical machine-tool demand can reverse.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Sustained order/margin recovery converting to profitability
verdicts.primaryRisk: Cyclical machine-tool downturn; AI-node thesis never materializes
